description: The Ferraro are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Oppido Mamertina, Italy. They are allied with the Raccosta family and part of the local 'ndrina of Oppido Mamertina. The clan has been involved in a long-running feud with the Mazzagatti-Polimeni-Bonarrigo clans, resulting in over 30 deaths. In 2016, boss Giuseppe Ferraro was arrested after 18 years as a fugitive.
